languages.text: {n}Пилот говорит сквозь зубы, прилагая усилия, чтобы не закричать.{/n} "Последнее, что я заметил — это движение по левому борту, Лорд-капитан. Что-то огромное, похожее на ствол дерева. Его либо метнули в шаттл, либо... Оно само на нас напало, Ваша Светлость".

traits.locale_text: {n}Пилот говорит сквозь зубы, прилагая усилия, чтобы не закричать.{/n} "Последнее, что я заметил — это движение по левому борту, Лорд-капитан. Что-то огромное, похожее на ствол дерева. Его либо метнули в шаттл, либо... Оно само на нас напало, Ваша Светлость".
traits.speaker: OurCrewPilot

languages.text: {n}The pilot speaks through clenched teeth, fighting the urge to shout.{/n} "Movement on the port side, that's the last thing I saw, Lord Captain. Something massive, like a tree trunk. It was either thrown at the shuttle or... it attacked us itself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: {n}Пилот говорит сквозь зубы, прилагая усилия, чтобы не закричать.{/n} "Последнее, что я заметил — это движение по левому борту, Лорд-капитан. Что-то огромное, похожее на ствол дерева. Его либо метнули в шаттл, либо... Оно само на нас напало, Ваша Светлость".

traits.locale_text: {n}The pilot speaks through clenched teeth, fighting the urge to scream.{/n} "Movement on the port side, that's the last thing I saw, Lord Captain. Something hulking, as if a tree trunk. It was either thrown at the shuttle or... it attacked us itself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

{n}The pilot speaks through clenched teeth, fighting the urge to shout.{/n} "Movement on the port side, that's the last thing I saw, Lord Captain. Something massive, like a tree trunk. It was either thrown at the shuttle or... it attacked us itself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

"I have no idea what it was, Lord Captain. All I can say for certain is that it was not a strike from a cannon or the like. It was probably some local fauna or flora. But if it's capable of bringing down a shuttle..."

{n}The pilot speaks through clenched teeth, fighting the urge to scream.{/n} "Movement on the port side, that's the last thing I saw, Lord Captain. Something hulking, as if a tree trunk. It was either thrown at the shuttle or... it attacked us itself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

{n}The pilot speaks through clenched teeth, fighting the urge to shout.{/n} "Movement on the port side, that's the last thing I saw, Lord Captain. Something massive, like a tree trunk. It was either thrown at the shuttle or... it attacked us itself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

languages.text: 「何だったのかは見当もつきません、ロードキャプテン。はっきり言えるのは、砲撃の類ではなかったということだけです。たぶんこの地の動植物でしょう。ですが、シャトルを落とせるほどだとすると…」
languages.original_text: "I have no idea what it was, Lord Captain. All I can say for certain is that it was not a strike from a cannon or the like. It was probably some local fauna or flora. But if it's capable of bringing down a shuttle..."

traits.locale_text: 「何だったのかは見当もつきません、ロードキャプテン。はっきり言えるのは、砲撃の類ではなかったということだけです。たぶんこの地の動植物でしょう。ですが、シャトルを落とせるほどだとすると……」

languages.text: {n}Le pilote parle à travers ses dents serrées, luttant pour résister à l'envie de crier.{/n} « La dernière chose que j'ai vue, c'est du mouvement à bâbord, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Quelque chose de massif, comme une sorte de tronc d'arbre. Soit on l'a jeté sur la navette... soit il nous a attaqués de son propre chef, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: {n}The pilot speaks through clenched teeth, fighting the urge to shout.{/n} "Movement on the port side, that's the last thing I saw, Lord Captain. Something massive, like a tree trunk. It was either thrown at the shuttle or... it attacked us itself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le pilote parle à travers ses dents serrées, luttant pour résister à l'envie de crier.{/n} « La dernière chose que j'ai vue, c'est du mouvement à bâbord, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Quelque chose de massif, comme une sorte de tronc d'arbre. Soit on l'a jeté sur la navette... soit il nous a attaqués de son propre chef, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: {n}Bağırma dürtüsüyle savaşan pilot, dişlerini sıkarak konuşuyor.{/n} "Gördüğüm son şey, iskele tarafındaki hareketlilikti Lord Kaptan. Ağaç gövdesi gibi devasa bir şeydi. Ya mekiğe fırlatıldı ya da... Kendisi bize saldırdı, {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: {n}The pilot speaks through clenched teeth, fighting the urge to shout.{/n} "Movement on the port side, that's the last thing I saw, Lord Captain. Something massive, like a tree trunk. It was either thrown at the shuttle or... it attacked us itself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bağırma dürtüsüyle savaşan pilot, dişlerini sıkarak konuşuyor.{/n} "Gördüğüm son şey, iskele tarafındaki hareketlilikti Lord Kaptan. Ağaç gövdesi gibi devasa bir şeydi. Ya mekiğe fırlatıldı ya da... Kendisi bize saldırdı, {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: {n}Der Pilot spricht durch zusammengebissene Zähne und unterdrückt den Drang, zu schreien.{/n} "Eine Bewegung auf Steuerbord, das war das Letzte, was ich gesehen habe, Lord Captain. Das Ding war groß ... wie ein Baumstamm. Es wurde entweder auf das Shuttle geworfen ... oder hat uns selbst angegriffen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: {n}The pilot speaks through clenched teeth, fighting the urge to shout.{/n} "Movement on the port side, that's the last thing I saw, Lord Captain. Something massive, like a tree trunk. It was either thrown at the shuttle or... it attacked us itself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Pilot spricht durch zusammengebissene Zähne und unterdrückt den Drang, zu schreien.{/n} "Eine Bewegung auf Steuerbord, das war das Letzte, was ich gesehen habe, Lord Captain. Das Ding war groß ... wie ein Baumstamm. Es wurde entweder auf das Shuttle geworfen ... oder hat uns selbst angegriffen, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."

languages.text: {n}El piloto habla con los dientes apretados, reprimiendo el impulso de gritar.{/n} «Lo último que vi fue un movimiento por el lado de babor, Lord Capitán. Era algo enorme, parecido al tronco de un árbol. O bien lo arrojaron contra la lanzadera, o... estaba vivo y nos atacó, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: {n}The pilot speaks through clenched teeth, fighting the urge to shout.{/n} "Movement on the port side, that's the last thing I saw, Lord Captain. Something massive, like a tree trunk. It was either thrown at the shuttle or... it attacked us itself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}El piloto habla con los dientes apretados, reprimiendo el impulso de gritar.{/n} «Lo último que vi fue un movimiento por el lado de babor, Lord Capitán. Era algo enorme, parecido al tronco de un árbol. O bien lo arrojaron contra la lanzadera, o... estaba vivo y nos atacó, mi{mf|lord|lady}».

languages.text: {n}飞行员咬紧牙关，强忍着怒吼的冲动。{/n}“左舷有东西在动，舰长大人，这是我最后看到的景象。一个庞然大物，像树干一样。它要么是被扔过来砸中了穿梭机，要么就是……它自己攻击了我们。”
languages.original_text: {n}The pilot speaks through clenched teeth, fighting the urge to shout.{/n} "Movement on the port side, that's the last thing I saw, Lord Captain. Something massive, like a tree trunk. It was either thrown at the shuttle or... it attacked us itself, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: {n}飞行员咬紧牙关，强忍着怒吼的冲动。{/n}“左舷有东西在动，舰长大人，这是我最后看到的景象。一个庞然大物，像树干一样。它要么是被扔过来砸中了穿梭机，要么就是……它自己攻击了我们。”
